allow: Bash(python manage.py dumpdata catalog.Category catalog.Product telegrambot.TelegramProfile --natural-foreign --natural-primary --indent 2 -o /tmp/shop_backup.json)

Bash(python -c "from telegrambot.handlers import common, verification; print\('common:', common.router.name\); print\('verification:', verification.router.name\); print\('begin_verification:', verification.begin_verification\)")
